title: English language tests tool :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## English language tests tool
Use this tool to find out if the visa you are applying for has English language requirements. The search results include the minimum scores you need to get if you take an English language test.
For some visas you need to be able to speak and understand English. Your partner and children may also need to show that they can speak and understand English. One of the ways you can show us your English language skills is by taking a language test.
There are no English language requirements for children younger than 16.
Visas not listed do not have any English language requirements.
English language requirements
